basic_details.job_title: NIO Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Oceanography (NIO) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Oceanography has released the official notification for 1 Project Associate - I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Goa. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc Marine Science, MSc Oceanography, MSc Physical Oceanography, MSc Space Science and Technology
qualification.details: MSc Marine Science MSc Oceanography MSc Physical Oceanography MSc Space Science and Technology

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIO Project Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate - I position at the National Institute of Oceanography is June 7, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MSc degree in Marine Science, Oceanography, Physical Oceanography, or Space Science and Technology to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate - I post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the NIO Project Associate - I recruitment must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate - I position at the National Institute of Oceanography.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The position of Project Associate - I is a contractual role, meaning it is offered on a fixed-term contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the National Institute of Oceanography located?
faq.answer: The National Institute of Oceanography is located in Goa, India.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification specifies applications are invited from eligible candidates in Goa. However, it's advisable to check the detailed notification for any inter-state application guidelines.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will be provided by the organization.
